meta.title: Raihan Zaki Alhafiz — Full Stack Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of Raihan Zaki Alhafiz — Full Stack Web Developer (Laravel, Vue.js, React). Projects, experience, and certifications.

hero.quote: Code with passion, build with purpose
hero.blurb: A Full Stack Web Developer focused on building modern web apps using Laravel, Vue.js, and React — from interactive UIs to RESTful APIs and database integration.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm Raihan Zaki Alhafiz, a Full Stack Web Developer with an Informatics Engineering background from Sebelas Maret University. I have experience developing modern and responsive web applications using Laravel, Vue.js, and React — skilled in both front-end and back-end development, including RESTful APIs, authentication systems, and database integration. Committed to delivering scalable and high-quality web solutions.
about.motto: Working with heart, creating with mind.

projects.subtitle: Showcasing a selection of projects that reflect my skills, creativity, and passion for building meaningful digital experiences.
